environment.objective: Answer a question by querying a small in-memory table.
environment.inputs: A natural-language question over a known schema.
environment.outputs: The scalar answer to the question.

tools.name: run_sql
tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL query against the seeded table and return rows.

tasks.name: Highest salary
tasks.prompt: In the employees table, what is the highest salary? Reply with the number.
